scripts.deploy:cf:root: pnpm --filter @zrr-website/root run build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --cwd apps/root
scripts.deploy:cf:blog: pnpm --filter @zrr-website/blog run build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --cwd apps/blog
scripts.deploy:cf:slides: pnpm --filter @zrr-website/slides run build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --cwd apps/slides
